column1: This document was prepared by Matt Royal, David Thompson, Nigel Willoughby and Lee Heard (DEW). Glen Scholz (DEW) provided principal oversight throughout and technical review of this report. Dr Tom Prowse (The University of Adelaide) provided an early sounding board regarding the general analysis methods used, their interpretation into classes and basic diagnostic checks on the results of Bayesian analyses. Improvements were made to this report and associated report card based on reviews by Marilyn Wilkins, Jason Vanlaarhoven, Colin Cichon, Ben Smith, Fi Taylor, Jason Higham, Michelle Bald and Sandy Carruthers (all DEW).
